## UI Design System Checklist

- [ ] No banned color families (gray, zinc, green, violet, teal)
- [ ] All raw colors have dark mode pairs
- [ ] Semantic tokens used where applicable (bg-card, text-muted-foreground, bg-primary, etc.)
- [ ] No `eslint-disable` comments added
- [ ] Tests updated for any class name changes
